prompt: Create a vibrant retro pop-art collage portrait using the uploaded photo as the face reference. Preserve the exact facial features, smile, eyes, nose, lips, hairstyle, and identity of the person. Convert the portrait into a high-contrast black-and-white editorial photograph while keeping the face realistic and recognizable. Add oversized bright yellow cat-eye sunglasses with turquoise transparent lenses and large daisy flower earrings with yellow centers. Surround the subject with a thick cream-colored paper-cutout outline. Use a bold background with diagonal teal and lime-green stripes, vintage paper texture, subtle grain, and distressed print effect. Mixed-media collage aesthetic, fashion magazine cover style, modern Pinterest-inspired graphic design, playful summer vibe, clean composition, cheerful expression, premium advertising poster, ultra-detailed, realistic skin texture, professional lighting, high resolution, 4K.
